name: Souhir Boujday
department: Laboratoire de Réactivité de Surface (LRS) — UMR 7197
title: Full Professor — Chair, School of Chemistry
summary: Chair of the School of Chemistry at Sorbonne Université. Research at LRS focuses on biointerfaces: functionalisation of nanoparticles and surfaces for biosensing and biomedical applications, surface spectroscopy, and protein–surface interactions.

name: Mathieu Mivelle
title: CNRS Researcher
summary: CNRS researcher at the Institut des NanoSciences de Paris (Sorbonne Université / CNRS). Research on nano-optics, plasmonic nanoantennas, magnetic light-matter interactions, and chiroptical effects at the nanoscale.
